word: G3827 - πάμπολυς - pámpolys - pam-pol-ooce - Very great

sections.paragraph:
- Original: πάμπολυς

- Transliteration: Pampolus

- Phonetic: pam-pol-ooce

- Definition:

1. very great

- Origin: from G3956 and G4183

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G3956 and G4183; full many that is immense: - very great.
